Sunken fortress gate with coral-forged portcullis, guard towers flanking entrance, weapon slots carved in stone.
Underwater battlefield strewn with broken tridents, shattered shields, and armor half-buried in drifting silt.
Ancient temple entrance guarded by massive stone leviathan statues, their eyes still glowing with defensive enchantments.
Shipwreck converted to outpost, hull reinforced with living coral, cannons replaced with harpoon batteries.
Volcanic vent ridge fortified as defensive line, superheated water creating impassable thermal barrier.
Deep trench border crossing marked by twin watchtowers, contested waters between rival ocean kingdoms.
Armory cavern filled with weapon racks holding coral-bladed swords, barbed tridents, and poison-tipped harpoons.
Watchtower spire jutting from ocean floor, bioluminescent beacon pulsing warnings across the dark depths.
Training grounds featuring coral obstacle course, kelp target dummies, and combat rings etched in sand.
Kraken's lair entrance scarred with massive tentacle gouges, warning signs carved by previous expeditions.
Tide-gate checkpoint controlling water flow between zones, heavily guarded chokepoint with murder holes above.
Coral barracks complex with sleeping alcoves, weapon storage, and central strategic planning chamber.
Underwater minefield of explosive sea urchins and triggered coral traps protecting kingdom approaches.
Command post inside hollowed seamount, maps of territory carved on walls, messengers constantly arriving.
Siege-damaged palace wall with breached sections hastily repaired, defenders still manning the ramparts.
Supply depot cave stocked with preserved kelp rations, medicinal sponges, and emergency weapon caches.
Forward scout station camouflaged in kelp forest, observation slits watching enemy territorial waters.
Prisoner holding pens carved from stone, reinforced with metal salvaged from surface ships.
Medical grotto with healing thermal springs, coral beds for wounded warriors, and sea witch attendants.
War memorial reef where coral grows over fallen warriors' weapons, their names inscribed in stone.
Underground tunnel network connecting defensive positions, too narrow for larger enemies to pursue.
Dock platform where war-dolphins and armored sea turtles receive their riders before battle.
Alchemist's workshop producing poison coatings, explosive compounds from volcanic minerals, healing elixirs.
Signal station with massive conch horns for alerts, bioluminescent flags conveying tactical messages.
Arena pit for trial by combat, surrounded by stone seats, ancient bloodstains still visible on sand.
